ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the market data */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price at the given timestamp */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price reached within the interval */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price reached within the interval */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price at the given timestamp */,
  "quote_volume" TEXT /* The total value of the base asset traded within the interval */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The total volume of the base asset traded within the interval */,
  "weighted_average" TEXT /* The weighted average price within the interval */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* The total trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "interval" TEXT /* The interval at which the market data is recorded (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "interval")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* The value that triggers the alert */,
  "timestamp_created" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the alert (active, triggered, expired) */,
  "trigger_price" TEXT /* The price that triggers the alert */,
  "trigger_volume" TEXT /* The volume that triggers the alert */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert is checked (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "portfolio_value" TEXT /* The current value of the user's trading portfolio */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* The name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* The symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* The circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* The maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* The amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* The price at which the trade occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "fee" TEXT /* The fee associated with the trade */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the fee is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feed" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the news item */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news item */,
  "timestamp_published" TEXT /* The timestamp when the news item was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the news item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feed_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "amount_owned" TEXT /* The amount of cryptocurrency owned */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* The average price at which the cryptocurrency was acquired */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* The total value of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis metric */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the metric is for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* The name of the metric (e.g., RSI, moving average) */,
  "value" TEXT /* The calculated value of the metric */,
  "timestamp_calculated" TEXT /* The timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "interval" TEXT /* The interval at which the metric is calculated (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_info" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* The name of the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The API key for the exchange */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* The API secret for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange the market is on */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* The name of the market */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* The base currency of the market */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* The quote currency of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_markets_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange_info ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_raw" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of raw data */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange the data is from */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the data is for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the data */,
  "data" TEXT /* The raw data itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_raw_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES exchange_markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_raw_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange_info ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_depth" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of market depth data */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the data is for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the data */,
  "bids" TEXT /* The bid side of the market depth */,
  "asks" TEXT /* The ask side of the market depth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_depth_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES exchange_markets ("market_id")
)
